headline: Invesco Ltd. Announces April 30, 2026 Assets Under Management
summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ)1, a leading global asset management firm announced today preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $2,339.4 billion, an increase of 8.3% versus previous month-end. The firm delivered net long-term inflows of $18.2 billion in the month. Money market net inflows were $2.2 billion. AUM was positively impacted by favorable market returns which increased AUM by $151 billion. FX increased AUM by $8.2 billion. Preliminary average total AUM for the quarter through A

headline: Invesco (IVZ) Is Up 6.0% After Strong Q1 Results And Higher Capital Returns Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Invesco Ltd. has reported past first-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$1,744.5 million and net income of US$268.6 million, alongside increased earnings per share from continuing operations, additional share repurchases, and higher cash dividends for both common and preferred shareholders. Together, the earnings improvement, buyback completion of 67,832,116 shares since 2016, and higher common and preferred dividends highlight Invesco’s emphasis on returning capital to investors...
